en: Children behave, that's what they say when we're together,
ko: 아이들은 얌전히 해, 우리가 함께 있을 때 그렇게 말해

en: and watch how you play, they don't understand,
ko: 놀 때 조심해, 그들은 이해하지 못해

en: and so we're running just as fast as we can,
holding on to one another then,
trying to get away into the night,
and then you put your arms around me and we tumble to the ground and then you say,
ko: 그때 네가 나를 안고 우리는 바닥에 넘어져

en: I think we're alone now, there doesn't seem to be anyone around,
I think we're alone now, the beating of our hearts is the only sound.
ko: 우리 이제 둘만 있는 것 같아

en: Look at the waves, we are undoing,
